pages.title: Ranger
pages.text: Combat primary. Bow-and-spear specialist. Twenty-three items, self-contained.

pages.title: Catalogue
pages.text: $(bold)Bows and crossbows.$(/) Composite, crystal, mechanic, royal, plus heavy and rapid crossbows.$(br2)$(bold)Spears.$(/) Flint, iron, gold, diamond, aeternium. Each with a reinforced socket and double haft.$(br2)$(bold)Armor.$(/) Archer (chain-reinforced leather) and Ranger (extra scute). Head, chest, legs, feet for each.$(br2)$(bold)Kit.$(/) Auto-fire hook, quiver, archer spell book.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: Netherite and ruby spear variants stay vanilla smithing upgrades from the bases you craft.$(br2)Matching trader: the Archer.
